creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
simon       2007-07-17 22:28:51 UTC

  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    usr.sbin/wpa/wpa_passphrase wpa_passphrase.8 
  Log:
  The wpa_passphrase(8) manual page states that it first appeared in
  FreeBSD 6.2, but it didn't make it into RELENG_6_2.
  
  Update the manual page to say "FreeBSD 6.3".
  
  PR:             docs/114429
  Submitted by:   Henrik Brix Andersen <henrik@brixandersen.dk>
  MFC after:      3 days
  Approved by:    re (bmah)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +2 -2      src/usr.sbin/wpa/wpa_passphrase/wpa_passphrase.8
